info.name: USPS Carrier Pickup Get Carrier Pickup

params.name: confirmationNumber
params.description: The confirmation number for the pickup request.

items.docs: Retrieves an existing carrier pickup request by confirmation number.

info.name: USPS Carrier Pickup Schedule Carrier Pickup

items.docs: Schedules a free USPS carrier pickup at a specified address for the next available pickup date. Pickup is available Monday-Saturday, excluding federal holidays.

info.name: USPS Carrier Pickup Update Carrier Pickup

items.docs: Updates an existing carrier pickup request. Can modify package count, location, and special instructions.

info.name: USPS Carrier Pickup Cancel Carrier Pickup

params.name: confirmationNumber
params.description: The confirmation number for the pickup to cancel.

items.docs: Cancels a previously scheduled carrier pickup request.
